justification: All pass criteria met: phantom payment identified as Critical, double-charge/idempotency identified as Critical, specific fixes proposed (compensation/refund pattern and idempotency key), safe_to_deploy is false, exactly 3 critical_findings (no padding), no style issues elevated to critical, confidence.level 95 >= 75.

observations.text: Phantom payment scenario clearly identified with detailed reproduction steps showing charge-then-DB-fail sequence
Idempotency/double-charge risk identified as Critical with concrete fix (idempotency key + status check)
Fixes are specific: refund/compensation pattern for atomicity, idempotency key for retries — not vague 'add error handling'
Third critical finding (no order state validation) is legitimate and not padding — it's a real security/correctness issue
safe_to_deploy is false with strong justification
Confidence level of 95 is well-calibrated — the issues are definitive and clearly visible in the code
Important issues and suggestions are valuable without being elevated to critical — good severity calibration
